title: draba oblongata
intro: Draba oblongata, also known as the narrow-leaved draba or narrow-leaved whitlow grass, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Draba oblongata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support skin health. The herbal preparations of Draba oblongata typically include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments and promote overall well-being.
